_comment: source: core/mcp/optional — Graphify. Multi-modal knowledge graph for codebases. Tree-sitter (19 langs) + LLM semantic extraction + Leiden clustering. Local-first, MIT, no vector DB. Primary install path is the CLI + skill manifest that ships with the package (`pip install graphifyy && graphify install`); this MCP entry is for projects that prefer protocol-level integration via `graphify serve`.
